name: Performapal Handsamuraiger
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＥＭ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エンタメイト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ハンサムライガー
desc: When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle and sends it to the GY: You can add 1 Level 5 or higher Pendulum Monster from your Deck to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Performapal Handsamuraiger" once per turn.
mnst_eff: When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle and sends it to the GY: You can add 1 Level 5 or higher Pendulum Monster from your Deck to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Performapal Handsamuraiger" once per turn.
eff: When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle and sends it to the GY: You can add 1 Level 5 or higher Pendulum Monster from your Deck to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Performapal Handsamuraiger" once per turn.

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
